decks.notes: The deck focuses on quickly putting powerful creatures like Griselbrand into play from the graveyard through cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Faithful Mending, while protecting the combo pieces with Force of Negation and Teferi, Time Raveler. Ephemerate and Psychic Frog provide additional value and disruption, while cards like Thoughtseize and Solitude help control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to win the game quickly by reanimating threats and overwhelming the opponent before they can establish their own board presence.

This deck revolves around assembling a combo using Basking Broodscale and Blade of the Bloodchief to create a powerful board presence with Glaring Fleshraker and Delighted Halfling. The deck utilizes various ways to search for key pieces such as Ancient Stirrings and Urza's Saga, while also including disruption spells like Kozilek's Command and Unholy Heat. The combo pieces are supported by mana acceleration from Eldrazi Temple and Grove of the Burnwillows, with additional utility from cards like Soul-Guide Lantern and Vexing Bauble. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and resilient combo.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and removal spells. By utilizing cards like Soul Spike and Necrodominance, the deck can deal damage directly to the opponent while maintaining board control. The inclusion of powerful creatures like Sheoldred, the Apocalypse and Dauthi Voidwalker adds additional threats to the battlefield. The deck also features a variety of removal spells, such as Fatal Push and Thoughtseize, to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, this deck aims to secure victory through a combination of aggressive creatures and efficient removal.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by countering spells, removing threats, and manipulating the opponent's plays. It utilizes various spells and planeswalkers to disrupt the opponent's strategy and maintain board control. The deck also includes cards that provide card advantage and card selection to ensure consistency in drawing the necessary answers. Overall, the deck aims to outlast the opponent by using a combination of control elements and powerful late-game cards to secure the win.

The deck focuses on utilizing Basking Broodscale and Blade of the Bloodchief to create a powerful combo that generates a massive amount of tokens to overwhelm the opponent. It also includes various Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and Glaring Fleshraker to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Other key cards like Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble provide additional removal and disruption, while cards like Ancient Stirrings and Urza's Saga help to search for important combo pieces. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overpower the opponent with a swarm of tokens.

The key concept of this deck is to utilize the synergy between Basking Broodscale and Blade of the Bloodchief to generate a powerful combo that can overwhelm the opponent quickly. This is supported by cards like Glaring Fleshraker and Malevolent Rumble to control the board and protect the combo pieces. Additionally, the inclusion of Eldrazi Temple and Emrakul, the Promised End provides a strong late-game threat. The deck also features cards like Ancient Stirrings and Urza's Saga to help find key pieces and maintain consistency in executing the combo.

The deck focuses on using instant reanimator cards like Ephemerate and Goryo's Vengeance to bring back powerful creatures like Griselbrand quickly. It also includes disruption in the form of Force of Negation and Thoughtseize to protect the combo. Atraxa, Grand Unifier is included to provide additional value by proliferating counters. The deck aims to quickly assemble the combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with powerful reanimated creatures and disrupt their game plan with removal and counter spells.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize various cards that allow for graveyard interaction in order to efficiently bring powerful creatures onto the battlefield. By utilizing cards like Faithless Looting, Persist, Unearth, and Thought Scour, along with a mix of reanimation targets like Archon of Cruelty and Emperor of Bones, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with large threats. Additionally, the deck includes disruption like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the board and protect its combo pieces.

The key concept of this deck is to assemble a powerful combo utilizing Basking Broodscale and Blade of the Bloodchief to generate massive amounts of mana and pump up creatures like Glaring Fleshraker. Cards like Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble provide disruption while Eldrazi Temple and Urza's Saga help ramp up the deck's resources. Emrakul, the Promised End serves as a powerful finisher, and with the right setup, this deck can overwhelm opponents quickly with its explosive gameplay.

This deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures like Griselbrand and reanimating them with spells such as Goryo's Vengeance. Utilizing cards like Quantum Riddler and Psychic Frog to set up the graveyard and protect your combo pieces while disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Negation. The goal is to outvalue and outpace your opponent by quickly assembling your combo and overwhelming them with powerful threats that are difficult to deal with.

This deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to quickly overwhelm your opponent with a combination of efficient creatures and powerful artifacts. By maximizing the synergy between artifacts in play and in the graveyard, the deck aims to maintain a steady flow of threats while disrupting the opponent's game plan. With a mix of aggressive creatures and versatile artifacts, this deck can apply pressure from multiple angles and adapt to different matchups. The key is to efficiently manage resources while taking advantage of the synergies inherent in the Affinity archetype.

The deck aims to efficiently generate mana with rituals and Manamorphose to cast Ral, Monsoon Mage and other spells that allow to draw cards and generate more mana. The combo pieces include Glimpse the Impossible and Past in Flames to set up a large storm count and finish the game with Grapeshot. The use of Ruby Medallion and Ral's abilities help reduce the cost of spells and maximize the efficiency of the combo. The deck also includes additional card draw and tutoring effects to find the necessary pieces to win the game quickly.

The key concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly and aggressively generate damage through efficient creatures and spells, maximizing damage output by buffing creatures like Monastery Swiftspear with instant spells like Mutagenic Growth and Lightning Bolt. The deck also utilizes cards like Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration for card advantage and consistency. By efficiently managing resources and maintaining a tempo advantage, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents and secure victory before they can stabilize.

The deck focuses on assembling the UrzaTron lands to generate a large amount of mana quickly, allowing for powerful plays such as casting Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, the Eye of the Storms. It also includes disruptive elements like Grafdigger's Cage and Chalice of the Void to control the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to control the board state and disrupt the opponent's strategy while building towards a powerful end game utilizing the UrzaTron lands and powerful Eldrazi creatures.

The main focus of this Modern UrzaTron Control deck is to ramp up to the powerful Urza lands (Urza's Mine, Urza's Power Plant, Urza's Tower) to quickly cast big Eldrazi creatures like Thought-Knot Seer and Sire of Seven Deaths. With support from Karn, the Great Creator, Ugin, Eye of the Storms and All Is Dust, the deck aims to control the board while using powerful spells like Chalice of the Void and Kozilek's Command to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also utilizes Abstergo Entertainment and Vexing Bauble for additional card advantage and disruption.

The deck focuses on utilizing a variety of control spells and card advantage engines to maintain board presence and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of Kaheera as a companion provides additional synergy and value, while cards like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and Teferi, Time Raveler offer powerful control options. The deck aims to control the game through counterspells, removal, and card draw, ultimately winning through incremental advantage and strategic plays. The mana base is designed to support a consistent control strategy, ensuring the deck can cast its spells effectively throughout the game.
